And knowing too much hurts you in two different ways. The first is if you've been in a space for a number of years and you met all the right people, you learned all the hard lessons, you know the nuances of that space, you're the most equipped to do it, but you also have the most scar tissue. And so some people literally can't get past the scar tissue and the trauma of it and emotionally they don't want to go back into that space again and they want to go into a new space and get new scar tissue from new spaces and like that's a very very very common thing.
